nasb.text: Are we not reckoned by him as foreigners? For he has sold us, and has also entirely consumed our purchase price.

esv.text: Are we not regarded by him as foreigners? For he has sold us, and he has indeed devoured our money.

cnv.text: 他不是把我們看作外人嗎？因為他把我們賣了，吞沒了我們的身價。

ccb.text: 我们早就被当作外人了，他卖了我们，把我们的身价全部吞了。

csbs.text: 我们不是被他看作外人吗？因为他把我们卖了，竟然彻底吞噬了我们的身价！
